form.formComment: Most recently second last of 15 at this track Cl2 on April 5 over 1230m, slow going 13 len behind Time Connection with 59.5kg at $5.50. The race before that 3rd of 8 at this track Cl2 on March 26 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Niccy's Affair carrying 58.5kg at $4. Never got into the race last start but this looks to set up much better for him today.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run held ground to the line 3rd of 12 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 3.5 len behind God Has Drifted with 56kg at $5. The race before that rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 9 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 19 over 1230m, slow going 4 len behind God Has Drifted carrying 56.5kg at $3. Never far away and can make his presence felt again.

form.formComment: Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Northam Cl1 October 30 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Muddy Waters carrying 58kg at $9. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Belmont Park 3yo Plate September 20 over 1000m, soft track; 7 len behind Playin'it Sweet with 56kg at $31. Fitter for a trial coming into this and she can make a statement on resumption.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after six months ran last of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl1 on February 22 over 1200m, 9 len behind Just Walter John with 56kg at $101. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at this track Mdn on May 16 over 1230m, 5 len behind Four Seas with 55.5kg at $18. Fitter but hard to see her featuring.
